📢 Thoughts on this report? Let us know!","url":"https://github.com/Doogie201/promptops-gui/pull/18#issuecomment-4001698643","createdAt":"2026-03-05T02:32:33Z"},{"author":{"login":"Doogie201"},"bodyText":"Addressed both connector findings in commit aa4ea8a:

Fixed settings drift detection to catch removed required global bindings (no pre-filter on existing keys; sprint placeholders excluded explicitly).
Fixed unresolved-placeholder determinism by using a non-global detection regex (PLACEHOLDER_DETECT_PATTERN) to avoid regex lastIndex carryover.

Validation receipts:

/tmp/promptops/S11/run_20260304_212353/remediation/01_fix_diffstat.txt
/tmp/promptops/S11/run_20260304_212353/remediation/02_s11_tests_after_fix.txt
/tmp/promptops/S11/run_20260304_212353/remediation/03_build_after_fix.txt
/tmp/promptops/S11/run_20260304_212353/remediation/04_lint_after_fix.txt
/tmp/promptops/S11/run_20260304_212353/remediation/05_testall_after_fix.txt","url":"https://github.com/Doogie201/promptops-gui/pull/18#issuecomment-4001702073","createdAt":"2026-03-05T02:33:44Z"}]},"reviewThreads":{"nodes":[{"id":"PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5yNkqX","isResolved":true,"isOutdated":false,"comments":{"nodes":[{"author":{"login":"chatgpt-codex-connector"},"bodyText":"Detect removed global bindings in drift check
In assessSettingsImpactOnPinnedTemplate, the required set is built by filtering placeholders with hasOwn(nextGlobalBindings, name), which means placeholders whose bindings were removed are excluded before missing is calculated. In the common settings-edit path, deleting a global binding that a pinned template still depends on will incorrectly return ok: true, so incompatible settings changes can slip through and later render/migration steps can proceed with broken placeholder resolution.
Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.","url":"https://github.com/Doogie201/promptops-gui/pull/18#discussion_r2887211360","createdAt":"2026-03-05T02:30:14Z"}]}},{"id":"PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5yNkqZ","isResolved":true,"isOutdated":true,"comments":{"nodes":[{"author":{"login":"chatgpt-codex-connector"},"bodyText":"Reset regex state before unresolved placeholder test
evaluateUnresolvedRequirements calls .test on the shared PLACEHOLDER_PATTERN regex, which is declared with the g flag, so lastIndex persists across calls. When previews are compiled repeatedly, this can cause unresolved_placeholders to appear/disappear nondeterministically for identical rendered content (notably when only one unresolved token exists), undermining the deterministic preview behavior this module is supposed to enforce.
Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.","url":"https://github.com/Doogie201/promptops-gui/pull/18#discussion_r2887211362","createdAt":"2026-03-05T02:30:14Z"}]}}]}}}}}
